data.description: THEON INTERNATIONAL unveils NYX-BiNOD at DSEI London 2025: Night Vision Binocular compliant with US Army specs.

data.title: Ant Group's AI healthcare app AQ has 140 million users, with 60% from tier-three and lower-tier cities.Updates aim for inclusive healthcare at the INCLUSION · Conference. CEO Cyril Han emphasizes empowering doctors and making AI more accessible.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, during the 2025 INCLUSION · Conference on the Bund in Shanghai, Ant Group unveiled enhancements to its AI-powered healthcare app AQ. The updates are designed to improve inclusivity and accessibility in healthcare. Ant Group's CEO, Cyril Han, expressed the goal of using AI to assist doctors in reaching more patients, enabling them to dedicate more time to medical research and combating complex illnesses. The app aims to equip community doctors with AI assistants.
China's foreign minister Wang Yi arrived in Vienna on Friday to meet his Austrian counterpart Beate Meinl-Reisinger for bilateral talks at the foreign ministry.

data.title: Félix Bernard to hold Autumn Private Auction in October with over 20 art masterpieces, attracting elite collectors globally.
data.description: A private art auction house, Félix Bernard in Paris, is set to host its Autumn Private Auction in October. The event will showcase a collection of more than 20 high-caliber art pieces, with expectations of stirring excitement and intense bidding among top collectors worldwide. Established by esteemed artist and connoisseur Mr. Félix Bernard, the Paris-based auction house aims to attract elite clientele.

data.title: Polkadot's (DOT) price nears $4.37 resistance on strong support for USDC/USDT acquisition and bullish indicators above key moving averages.
data.description: The price of DOT is currently at $4.20, showing bullish momentum. The Polkadot Treasury's proposal to acquire USDC/USDT has received a strong 96.3% support. Additionally, technical analysis indicates that DOT is showing strength above important moving averages.

data.title: Anebulo Pharmaceuticals in Austin, TX provides an update on the going private transaction and strategic alternatives.
data.description: A pharmaceutical company based in Austin, Texas, known as Anebulo Pharmaceuticals, has recently shared an update regarding its plan to go private. The company has also mentioned exploring strategic alternatives. The specifics of the transaction and alternatives were not disclosed in the announcement. The news comes amidst a trend of companies exploring similar moves. This development marks a potential shift in the company's direction and ownership structure. It will be interesting to see how this decision unfolds and the impact it may have on the industry.

data.title: Gemini's IPO priced at $28 per share; set to debut on Nasdaq. Signals changing views on digital assets.
data.description: Gemini's initial public offering (IPO) in the crypto sector has become a significant event this year, capturing much attention. The IPO signifies a change in Washington's perspective on digital assets.

data.title: Equity Residential (EQR) declares $0.6925/share dividend on common stock, $1.03625/share dividend on Series K Preferred Shares.
data.description: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) has declared its quarterly dividends for both common and preferred shares. For the third quarter, a regular common share dividend of $0.6925 per share will be paid out on October 10, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 25, 2025. Additionally, a quarterly dividend of $1.03625 per share will be paid on September 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 19, 2025, for the Company’s Series K Preferred Shares.

data.title: Applied Materials approves $0.46 per share cash dividend, payable Dec. 11, 2025 to shareholders as of Nov. 20, 2025.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, on September 12, 2025, Applied Materials, Inc. disclosed a cash dividend of $0.46 per share for its common stock. This quarterly dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, will be paid out on December 11, 2025, to shareholders on record as of November 20, 2025.

data.title: Stallion Uranium allocates new stock options to employees, undisclosed amount.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate by 2.5% compared to the previous year, with the current rate standing at 7.8%. Additionally, the number of job losses in the past month alone has reached a staggering 1.2 million, marking a sharp rise in economic instability. The government has announced plans to implement new policies to address this growing concern and provide support to those affected by the job market downturn. Experts suggest that immediate action is necessary to prevent further exacerbation of the situation.

data.title: Gelteq's gel technology powers U.S. product launches for Healthy Extracts in the nutraceutical market, NASDAQ: GELS.
data.description: Based in Melbourne, Australia, Gelteq Limited (NASDAQ: GELS), a renowned developer of gel-based oral delivery solutions, has shown its delight towards the latest product debuts by Healthy Extracts, Inc. (OTCQB: HYEX) in the U.S. nutraceutical market. Healthy Extracts, using Gelteq's exclusive gel technology, has recently launched new products. This collaboration has garnered attention as it introduces innovative health products to the market.

data.title: Domestic Metals Corp. updates exploration activities at Smart Creek Project in Montana, focusing on porphyry copper-gold and CRD mineralization. Exploration drilling planned for Q4, 2025.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, Sept. 12, 2025 - Domestic Metals Corp. (referred to as “Company” or “Domestic”) - (TSXV: DMCU; OTCQB: DMCUF; FSE: 03E) has issued an update on exploration activities at the Smart Creek Project in western Montana. Fieldwork, encompassing mapping, sampling, and prospecting, is currently in progress at Smart Creek. The primary goal is to pinpoint lithological, structural, alteration, and geochemical indicators for porphyry copper-gold and CRD copper-gold-silver-zinc mineralization. Key target areas identified include Smart Creek, Sunrise, and Radio Tower zones, with plans to move them to the exploration drilling phase in Q4, 2025.

data.title: Africa's first treasury company sees Bitcoin as a unique opportunity, with utility beyond stocks.
data.description: The first Bitcoin treasury company in Africa has been established, marking a significant milestone for the continent. This company's value surpasses publicly-listed stocks that are linked to Bitcoin holdings on a balance sheet. This development showcases the growing adoption and integration of cryptocurrencies in Africa.

data.title: Polyrizon's study shows successful intranasal delivery of PL-14 Allergy Blocker, with results supporting its potential for allergic rhinitis treatment.
data.description: In Ra’anana, Israel, on Sept. 12, 2025, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ) shared positive preclinical findings for its PL-14 Allergy Blocker product. The biotech firm, specializing in intranasal product development, presented results from a study done in partnership with the University of Parma (Italy). The research showcased precise deposition in the nasal vestibule, a crucial area for early allergen interaction. This underlines the effectiveness of the PL-14 Allergy Blocker as a barrier treatment for allergic rhinitis, a common condition.
